summary: Private beta Windows build with social invites and lobby flow updates.
notes: Added friends and lobby invite support for beta testers.
Invites can create a Relay lobby automatically before the host starts the match.
Improved menu controller cleanup for the new social panel flow.

noteSections.title: Social
items: Added Supabase-backed friends and pending lobby invites.
Added launcher-to-game identity handoff for player profiles.

noteSections.title: Known Beta Notes
items: Players should launch the game through the signed-in launcher for social features.
Gameplay balance and final art are still in progress.
